summary: Completed all steps. Created geometry_error_handling.rs test file with FailingMockGeometryKernel and FailingExportMockGeometryKernel. Fixed Engine::build() to count total_ops and skip export when last_handle.is_none() && total_ops > 0, pushing a summary diagnostic instead. All 4 new tests pass (kernel failure, compile failure, export skip verification, no-realizations regression). All 140 tests across the crate pass with zero regressions.

Completed ALL 16 steps + 1 prerequisite for the auto keyword task. Grammar: added auto_keyword rule to tree-sitter grammar and regenerated parser. Parser: added ExprKind::Auto variant and auto_keyword handling in lower_param. Compiler: added ValueCellKind::Auto and compile-time detection of ExprKind::Auto in param defaults. Test support: added auto_param() builder method. Eval: updated Snapshot::from_compiled_module to initialize Auto cells as (Undef, DeterminacyState::Auto), added Auto handling in Engine::eval() and Engine::eval_cached() with version fast-path, cache reuse, and param_overrides support. Constraints naturally return Indeterminate for auto params via Undef propagation. All workspace tests pass with zero regressions.
